scenario.title: The Map-Reduce Analyzer
scenario.context: You're processing a large document by splitting it into chunks, processing each chunk in parallel (map), and then combining results (reduce). This pattern enables processing of content that exceeds AI context limits.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that implements a map-reduce pattern for large content processing with proper chunking, parallel processing, and result aggregation.
scenario.exampleInput: Analyze a 50-page report: Chunk into ~5 page sections, extract key points from each (map), then synthesize into executive summary (reduce). Handle entities that span chunks.
hints: Define how to split the content
Specify what each map operation extracts
Design how to merge potentially conflicting results

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear strategy with overlap and boundaries
Complete map prompt with output schema

commonMistakes: Map output not structured for merging
